nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as inefficient replacement for expert judgment
nodes.grounding_span: AI has been great in assisting me with coming up with creative and unique assignments

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for student work
nodes.grounding_span: show them how AI can be used at each step in the process to augment and assist their work, not replace it

nodes.label: AI as resource expander for course planning
nodes.grounding_span: gained access to dozens of stories, movies, and novels that I would not have known about otherwise

nodes.label: AI as creative phrasing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as efficient shortcut for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I find if I use AI for that, I often have to revise enough to get what I'm looking for, that it wasn't worth the time

nodes.label: AI as co-pilot under human control
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human teacher role
nodes.grounding_span: AI co-pilots in the classroom assisting teachers with their classes

nodes.label: Creative and effective teaching
nodes.grounding_span: helped immensely with planning my course

nodes.label: Student learning and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: students need the guidance of people in the real world with whom they can build trusting relationships

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it's often faster for me to write up what I'm looking for

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I have been particularly pleased with its efforts in helping prepare for classes

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I find if I use AI for that, I often have to revise enough to get what I'm looking for, that it wasn't worth the time

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI in education
nodes.grounding_span: I'm excited about the future of AI and what it has to offer education

nodes.label: Belief in irreplaceable human element
nodes.grounding_span: AI will not change that aspect of education

nodes.label: Proactive leadership and policy shaping — takes initiative in guiding AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I'm the head of the AI Board at our school, and in charge of training other teachers
